title: GEEZY Glass Salt and Pepper Shakers Set with Metal Stand - 3 Piece Cruet Set with Carry Handle, Stainless Steel Lids, Refillable Seasoning Pots - Kitchen Essentials for New Home, Kitchen, Restaurant
features: COMPLETE SEASONING SOLUTION: Keep your dining table organized with this salt and pepper set. Includes two glass shakers and a stylish metal stand. A perfect cruet set for any home, restaurant or bar.
EASY TO REFILL & USE: Clear glass bodies let you know when to refill. The stainless steel screw-top lids make these salt and pepper pots easy to fill with spices without mess.
PORTABLE WITH CARRY HANDLE: The sturdy metal stand features a wooden-effect handle. Easily transport this condiment set from the kitchen to the dining table or out to a BBQ.
DURABLE & VERSATILE DESIGN: Built to last with quality glass and metal. These salt & pepper shakers suit all fine grain seasonings. An essential, classic pepper and salt shaker choice.

SPECIFICATIONS: Item Dimensions: Width: 13 cm, Depth: 6 cm, Height: 13 cm / Weight: 320 g / Package Dimensions: Height: 13 cm, Width: 13 cm, Depth: 7 cm / Package Weight: 330 g / Material: Glass / Color: Grey / Shaker Dimensions: Width: 4.2 cm, Height: 9 cm
